official_docs_basis.project_use: Track and role packets can be sent as structured inputs for proposal generation without mutating local state.
Role order is represented as explicit task dependencies and handoff targets.
Future runs should keep redacted traces for handoffs, tool calls, approvals, and unresolved risk notes.
Future ChatGPT control surfaces should expose narrow project tools instead of arbitrary shell, account, or DAW access.

purpose: Metadata-only OpenAI production swarm queue tying role-scoped worker briefs to each generated track and DAW mutation handoff.

prompt_packet.instruction: Review public-domain source candidates and historical motif notes for Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn; return rights/provenance notes and unresolved risks only.
must_not: read credentials, cookies, license files, or account artifacts
mutate Ableton Live, Max for Live, vendor accounts, exports, or releases without approval evidence

track_summary.title: Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn

suggested_openai_surface.name: Responses API
suggested_openai_surface.use: Generate structured arrangement proposals, worker briefs, source summaries, session patch plans, and release checklists from repository manifests.

prompt_packet.instruction: Map AeroBand banjo-controller performance constraints for Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn; return controller and MIDI articulation proposals only.
must_not: break live playability for theoretical complexity
read credentials, cookies, license files, or account artifacts
mutate Ableton Live, Max for Live, vendor accounts, exports, or releases without approval evidence

track_summary.title: Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn

suggested_openai_surface.name: Agents SDK
suggested_openai_surface.use: Coordinate role-specific production agents with handoffs, tool contracts, trace review, and approval boundaries.

expected_outputs: reviewable .maxpat source or documented device prototype

prompt_packet.instruction: Translate Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn device needs into Max for Live source-contract work items; return source-only patch notes and automation targets.
must_not: commit binary .amxd without Git LFS and review
read credentials, cookies, license files, or account artifacts
